title: Mindfully Flaky Syrian Pastry Flatbread
description: A fermented and flaky Syrian pastry flatbread featuring double cream, perfect for a brunch mood, with an ayurvedic-rajasic friendly twist.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it ferment in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a large rectangle.
Brush the dough with melted butter and fold it into a triangle.
Brush the triangle with double cream and fold it into a square.
Place the square on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
